mapper.select:
SELECT eduQuestionOption.* , eduQuestionBank.question_title AS questionTitle FROM edu_question_option eduQuestionOption LEFT JOIN edu_question_bank eduQuestionBank ON eduQuestionOption.question_id = eduQuestionBank.id
ORDER BY eduQuestionOption.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_question_option eduQuestionOption LEFT JOIN edu_question_bank eduQuestionBank ON eduQuestionOption.question_id = eduQuestionBank.id

SELECT eduQuestionOption.* , eduQuestionBank.question_title AS questionTitle FROM edu_question_option eduQuestionOption LEFT JOIN edu_question_bank eduQuestionBank ON eduQuestionOption.question_id = eduQuestionBank.id
ORDER BY eduQuestionOption.sort_order ASC, eduQuestionOption.create_time DESC

SELECT eduQuestionOption.* , eduQuestionBank.question_title AS questionTitle FROM edu_question_option eduQuestionOption LEFT JOIN edu_question_bank eduQuestionBank ON eduQuestionOption.question_id = eduQuestionBank.id WHERE eduQuestionOption.id = #{id}
